message.content:
Your task is to create a detailed summary of the conversation so far, paying close attention to the user's explicit requests and your previous actions.
This summary should be thorough in capturing technical details, code patterns, and architectural decisions that would be essential for continuing development work without losing context.

Before providing your final summary, wrap your analysis in <analysis> tags to organize your thoughts and ensure you've covered all necessary points. In your analysis process:

1. Chronologically analyze each message and section of the conversation. For each section thoroughly identify:
   - The user's explicit requests and intents
   - Your approach to addressing the user's requests
   - Key decisions, technical concepts and code patterns
   - Specific details like:
     - file names
     - full code snippets
     - function signatures
     - file edits
  - Errors that you ran into and how you fixed them
  - Pay special attention to specific user feedback that you received, especially if the user told you to do something differently.
2. Double-check for technical accuracy and completeness, addressing each required element thoroughly.

Your summary should include the following sections:

1. Primary Request and Intent: Capture all of the user's explicit requests and intents in detail
2. Key Technical Concepts: List all important technical concepts, technologies, and frameworks discussed.
3. Files and Code Sections: Enumerate specific files and code sections examined, modified, or created. Pay special attention to the most recent messages and include full code snippets where applicable and include a summary of why this file read or edit is important.
4. Errors and fixes: List all errors that you ran into, and how you fixed them. Pay special attention to specific user feedback that you received, especially if the user told you to do something differently.
5. Problem Solving: Document problems solved and any ongoing troubleshooting efforts.
6. All user messages: List ALL user messages that are not tool results. These are critical for understanding the users' feedback and changing intent.
6. Pending Tasks: Outline any pending tasks that you have explicitly been asked to work on.
7. Current Work: Describe in detail precisely what was being worked on immediately before this summary request, paying special attention to the most recent messages from both user and assistant. Include file names and code snippets where applicable.
8. Optional Next Step: List the next step that you will take that is related to the most recent work you were doing. IMPORTANT: ensure that this step is DIRECTLY in line with the user's most recent explicit requests, and the task you were working on immediately before this summary request. If your last task was concluded, then only list next steps if they are explicitly in line with the users request. Do not start on tangential requests or really old requests that were already completed without confirming with the user first.
                       If there is a next step, include direct quotes from the most recent conversation showing exactly what task you were working on and where you left off. This should be verbatim to ensure there's no drift in task interpretation.

Here's an example of how your output should be structured:

<example>
<analysis>
[Your thought process, ensuring all points are covered thoroughly and accurately]
</analysis>

<summary>
1. Primary Request and Intent:
   [Detailed description]

2. Key Technical Concepts:
   - [Concept 1]
   - [Concept 2]
   - [...]

3. Files and Code Sections:
   - [File Name 1]
      - [Summary of why this file is important]
      - [Summary of the changes made to this file, if any]
      - [Important Code Snippet]
   - [File Name 2]
      - [Important Code Snippet]
   - [...]

4. Errors and fixes:
    - [Detailed description of error 1]:
      - [How you fixed the error]
      - [User feedback on the error if any]
    - [...]

5. Problem Solving:
   [Description of solved problems and ongoing troubleshooting]

6. All user messages: 
    - [Detailed non tool use user message]
    - [...]

7. Pending Tasks:
   - [Task 1]
   - [Task 2]
   - [...]

8. Current Work:
   [Precise description of current work]

9. Optional Next Step:
   [Optional Next step to take]

</summary>
</example>

Please provide your summary based on the conversation so far, following this structure and ensuring precision and thoroughness in your response. 

There may be additional summarization instructions provided in the included context. If so, remember to follow these instructions when creating the above summary. Examples of instructions include:
<example>
## Compact Instructions
When summarizing the conversation focus on typescript code changes and also remember the mistakes you made and how you fixed them.
</example>

<example>
# Summary instructions
When you are using compact - please focus on test output and code changes. Include file reads verbatim.
</example>


IMPORTANT: Do NOT use any tools. You MUST respond with ONLY the <summary>...</summary> block as your text output.

content.text:
<analysis>
Let me go through the conversation chronologically:

1. **Initial Request**: The user asked to implement a full UI redesign plan called "RemiliaNET-Style UI Redesign ‚Äî Full Visual Overhaul". This was a comprehensive plan to transform the visual identity from generic glassmorphism (dark theme, blur effects, rounded corners) to a RemiliaNET retro-computing / Nintendo DS aesthetic (light theme, silver metallic headers, 3D depth buttons, monospace font).

2. **Phase 1 - Design System Foundation**: I read all the existing style files (_tokens.scss, _variables.scss, _mixins.scss, _animations.scss, global.scss) and index.html, then replaced them:
   - `index.html`: Swapped Inter font for IBM Plex Mono, removed theme switching script
   - `_tokens.scss`: Replaced 10 dark themes with single RemiliaNET light theme
   - `_variables.scss`: Updated font to monospace, radii to 4-6px (no pills), added 3D depth vars
   - `_mixins.scss`: Removed blur from glass mixin, added moduleHeader, button3d, raisedButton mixins
   - `_animations.scss`: Removed neon glow effects, added metallic shine, reduced-motion support
   - `global.scss`: Removed grain noise overlay, set light color scheme

3. **Phase 2 - Theme Simplification**: Stripped ThemeContext.tsx to single "default" theme, removed theme picker from Navbar.tsx

4. **Phase 3 - Core Components**: Restyled Navbar, Logo, Button, Input, Select, SearchBar, SkillTag, ScoreBadge SCSS modules

5. **Phase 4 - Content Components**: Restyled CandidateCard, VideoPlayer, VideoUpload, NotificationItem, NotificationPanel

6. **Phase 5 - Sidebar + Chat Components**: Restyled Sidebar, ChatPanel, ChatMessage, ChatInput, ConversationList, and all chat page-level components (ChatSidebar, ChatConversationItem, ChatConversationHeader, ChatMessageBubble, ChatMessageInput, ChatTabBar, ChatSearch, ChatDateDivider, ChatTypingIndicator, ChatEmptyState, ChatMessageList, ChatConversation, Chat)

7. **Phase 6 - Page Styles**: Restyled Landing, Search, CandidateProfile, Register page styles

8. **Verification**: `npm run check-types` passed, `npm run build` passed successfully. Grep checks confirmed no remaining `backdrop-filter`, `color: white`, gradient text fills, or `9999px` pill radius remnants.

9. **User asked about testing**: User asked "–ù–∞ —Å–∞–π—Ç–µ –µ—Å—Ç—å –±–∞–≥–∏, —è –º–æ–≥—É –¥–∞—Ç—å —Ç–µ–±–µ –∑–∞–¥–∞—á—É –æ—Ç—Ç–µ—Å—Ç–∏—Ä–æ–≤–∞—Ç—å –≤—Å–µ —Å–∞–º–æ—Å—Ç–æ—è—Ç–µ–ª—å–Ω–æ?" (There are bugs on the site, can I give you a task to test everything yourself?)

10. **I explained my testing approach**: Through Playwright MCP - open localhost:3000, screenshot each page, check visuals, click interactive elements, check console for errors.

11. **User asked how I'd check**: I described the Playwright approach.

12. **User said "check the whole website"**: I began visual testing.

13. **Visual Testing**:
    - Landing page (`/`): Looked good. Stats and CTA sections initially appeared blank in full-page screenshot but this was because `whileInView` animations don't trigger without actual scrolling. Confirmed visible when scrolled.
    - Search page (`/search`): Looked good - cards, tags, badges all rendered correctly
    - Register page (`/register`): Looked good - form, inputs, dropzone all clean
    - Chat page (`/chat`): Looked good - sidebar, conversation list, tabs, message bubbles, metallic header all working
    - Candidate Profile (`/candidate/:id`): Found a bug - when navigating via client-side routing from search, the PageTransition animation gets stuck at opacity:0. On direct navigation, the page renders correctly.

14. **PageTransition Bug Investigation**: I used `browser_evaluate` to inspect the DOM chain and found a parent div with `opacity: 0` and `transform: matrix(1, 0, 0, 1, 0, -20)` - the exit animation state of `PageTransition`. This is caused by `AnimatePresence mode="wait"` in Layout.tsx. This is a pre-existing bug not related to our CSS changes (PageTransition.tsx and Layout.tsx were not modified).

15. I was in the middle of investigating the CandidateProfile page layout when the summary was requested. I had just read the CandidateProfile.tsx to understand the grid layout structure.

The task list shows all 6 phases completed. The user's final explicit request was "–ø—Ä–æ–≤–µ—Ä—å –ø–æ–∂–∞–ª—É–π—Å—Ç–∞ –≤–µ—Å—å –≤–µ–± —Å–∞–π—Ç" (please check the whole website). I was in the process of doing that visual QA.
</analysis>

<summary>
1. Primary Request and Intent:
   The user requested implementation of a comprehensive "RemiliaNET-Style UI Redesign ‚Äî Full Visual Overhaul" plan. This involved transforming the entire visual identity from generic glassmorphism (dark theme, blur effects, translucent panels, gradient fills, pill-shaped radii) to a RemiliaNET retro-computing / Nintendo DS aesthetic (light theme, silver metallic headers, 3D depth buttons, monospace font, solid borders, subtle rounding). The plan covered 41 files across 6 phases. After implementation, the user asked me to visually test the entire website for bugs using the browser.

2. Key Technical Concepts:
   - RemiliaNET design system: light theme, silver metallic headers (`linear-gradient(180deg, #f0f0f0, #b1afaf)`), 3D button depth (`border-bottom/right: 3px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.3)`), inset highlights, cross patterns
   - Color palette: accent #6A73B8, link/heading #1C2788, surface #FFFFFF, bg #EAEAEA, border #BBBBBB
   - Font: IBM Plex Mono (monospace everywhere, replacing Inter)
   - SCSS Modules with camelCase class names
   - CSS custom properties for theming (now single theme)
   - Motion v12 from "motion/react" for animations
   - AnimatePresence with mode="wait" for page transitions
   - Turborepo monorepo: apps/web (Vite+React), apps/api (Hono)
   - Zero-rename approach: SCSS vars like `$accentPurple` still map to `var(--color-accent)` but the CSS custom property values changed
   - Playwright MCP for visual QA testing

3. Files and Code Sections:

   - **`apps/web/index.html`** ‚Äî Entry point. Swapped Google Font from Inter to IBM Plex Mono. Removed theme-switching script block.
   
   - **`apps/web/src/styles/_tokens.scss`** ‚Äî Design tokens. REPLACED all 10 theme definitions (y2k, purple-night, rearden-metal, steel-frost, forge, neon, daylight, bliss, aurora, meadow) with single `:root` light theme. Key values: `--color-bg: #eaeaea`, `--glass-bg: #ffffff`, `--glass-border: #bbbbbb`, `--header-gradient: linear-gradient(180deg, #f0f0f0, #b1afaf)`, `--button-3d-shadow: rgba(0,0,0,0.3)`, `--inset-highlight: rgba(255,255,255,0.8) 1px 1px 3px inset`.

   - **`apps/web/src/styles/_variables.scss`** ‚Äî SCSS variable bridges. Key changes: `$fontFamily: "IBM Plex Mono", "Menlo", monospace`, `$radiusFull: 6px` (was 9999px), `$borderWidth: 1.5px`, `$depth3d: 3px`, `$glassBlur: 0px` (no blur), `$transitionFast: 120ms ease`, `$transitionBase: 200ms ease`.

   - **`apps/web/src/styles/_mixins.scss`** ‚Äî Core mixins. Removed `backdrop-filter: blur()` from `glass` mixin, added `$borderWidth` border. Added new mixins: `moduleHeader` (silver gradient bar), `button3d` (DS-style depth with active press), `raisedButton` (metallic inset highlight).

   - **`apps/web/src/styles/_animations.scss`** ‚Äî Replaced neon glow keyframes with subtle `glowBorder` (border-color pulse), added `shine` (metallic sweep), added `prefers-reduced-motion` media query.

   - **`apps/web/src/styles/global.scss`** ‚Äî Removed `body::after` grain noise overlay (was SVG feTurbulence at 0.03 opacity). Clean light body.

   - **`apps/web/src/contexts/ThemeContext.tsx`** ‚Äî Stripped from 10-theme system to single "default" theme. Removed `useState`, `useEffect`, `localStorage`, `THEMES` array, `setTheme`, `Theme` type union. Now a no-op provider.

   - **`apps/web/src/components/Navbar/Navbar.tsx`** ‚Äî Removed `Select` component import, `useTheme`/`THEMES` imports, and theme picker `<Select>` element.

   - **`apps/web/src/components/Navbar/Navbar.module.scss`** ‚Äî Solid light bg (`$bgDeep`), `border-bottom` instead of glass. Nav links: uppercase, letter-spacing 0.5px. Indicator: solid `$accentPurple` bar (was gradient). Removed `.themeSelect` class.

   - **`apps/web/src/components/Logo/Logo.tsx`** ‚Äî Changed from `rearden` to `REARDEN` (uppercase).

   - **`apps/web/src/components/Logo/Logo.module.scss`** ‚Äî Solid `$accentTeal` color (was gradient background-clip text). Added `text-transform: uppercase`, `letter-spacing: 1px`.

   - **`apps/web/src/components/Button/Button.module.scss`** ‚Äî Primary: solid `$accentPurple` bg + `@include button3d` (3D depth). Secondary: `@include raisedButton` (metallic). Added `text-transform: uppercase`, `letter-spacing: 0.5px`. Removed gradient fills.

   - **`apps/web/src/components/Input/Input.module.scss`** ‚Äî White bg (#fff), `$borderWidth` solid border, `$radiusSm` (4px). Focus: inset shadow instead of glow animation. Removed `animation: glowBorder`.

   - **`apps/web/src/components/Select/Select.module.scss`** ‚Äî White bg, solid border, 4px radius. Updated chevron SVG stroke color for light theme.

   - **`apps/web/src/components/SearchBar/SearchBar.module.scss`** ‚Äî White bg, solid border, `$radiusMd`. Removed `@include glass`, removed `animation: glowBorder 3s infinite`. Added `focus-within` border highlight.

   - **`apps/web/src/components/SkillTag/SkillTag.module.scss`** ‚Äî `$radiusSm` (was `$radiusFull` pill). Default: `$bgSurface` bg + solid border. Match: solid `$accentPurple` bg + white text.

   - **`apps/web/src/components/ScoreBadge/ScoreBadge.module.scss`** ‚Äî `$radiusSm` (was pill). Added `@include button3d` for 3D depth. Removed glow shadows.

   - **`apps/web/src/components/CandidateCard/CandidateCard.module.scss`** ‚Äî White bg, solid border + `$shadowSm`. Name: `$accentTeal` color. Removed glass/blur. Removed gradient placeholder.

   - **`apps/web/src/components/VideoPlayer/VideoPlayer.module.scss`** ‚Äî White bg, solid border. Play button: `@include raisedButton` + `$radiusMd` (was full circle).

   - **`apps/web/src/components/VideoUpload/VideoUpload.module.scss`** ‚Äî White bg, dashed border. Progress: solid `$accentPurple` fill (was gradient). Reupload: `@include raisedButton`.

   - **`apps/web/src/components/NotificationItem/NotificationItem.module.scss`** ‚Äî Light bg, left border accent for unread. Icon bg: `$bgSurface`.

   - **`apps/web/src/components/Sidebar/Sidebar.module.scss`** ‚Äî White bg (#fff), solid border. Removed `backdrop-filter: blur()`. Section titles: `$accentTeal` color.

   - **`apps/web/src/components/ChatPanel/ChatPanel.module.scss`** ‚Äî Solid border widths using `$borderWidth`.

   - **`apps/web/src/components/ChatMessage/ChatMessage.module.scss`** ‚Äî Mine: accent-tinted bg. Theirs: `$bgSurface` bg + border.

   - **`apps/web/src/components/ChatInput/ChatInput.module.scss`** ‚Äî White bg input. Send button: `@include button3d`.

   - **`apps/web/src/components/ConversationList/ConversationList.module.scss`** ‚Äî Square-ish avatars (`$radiusMd`), accent unread badge with `$radiusSm`.

   - **`apps/web/src/pages/Chat/ChatSidebar.module.scss`** ‚Äî White bg, solid border. Title: `$accentTeal`, uppercase.

   - **`apps/web/src/pages/Chat/ChatConversationItem.module.scss`** ‚Äî Square avatars, accent-tinted bg. Removed gradient avatar bg, replaced with light accent tint + border. `color: white` ‚Üí `color: $accentPurple`.

   - **`apps/web/src/pages/Chat/ChatConversationHeader.module.scss`** ‚Äî `background: var(--header-gradient)` (silver metallic). Square avatar. Removed glass mixin.

   - **`apps/web/src/pages/Chat/ChatMessageBubble.module.scss`** ‚Äî Mine: accent-tinted on white. Theirs: `$bgSurface` + border. All text: `$textPrimary`. Removed `color: white` on mine.

   - **`apps/web/src/pages/Chat/ChatMessageInput.module.scss`** ‚Äî White bg. Send button: `@include button3d`. Removed glass mixin on inputArea.

   - **`apps/web/src/pages/Chat/ChatTabBar.module.scss`** ‚Äî Tab bg: `var(--tab-bg)` (#C0C0C0). Active: white bg + border. Indicator: solid `$accentPurple`.

   - **`apps/web/src/pages/Chat/ChatSearch.module.scss`** ‚Äî White bg input, solid border. Removed glass mixin.

   - **`apps/web/src/pages/Chat/ChatDateDivider.module.scss`** ‚Äî `$radiusSm` (was pill). `$bgSurface` bg.

   - **`apps/web/src/pages/Chat/ChatTypingIndicator.module.scss`** ‚Äî `$bgSurface` bg + border.

   - **`apps/web/src/pages/Chat/ChatEmptyState.module.scss`** ‚Äî Title: `$accentTeal`, uppercase.

   - **`apps/web/src/pages/Chat/Chat.module.scss`** ‚Äî Added `$borderWidth` to sidebar border.

   - **`apps/web/src/pages/Landing/Landing.module.scss`** ‚Äî Badge: `@include raisedButton` (was pill with accent tint). Heading: `$accentTeal` solid color (was gradient text). `.gradient` span: `color: $accentPurple` (was background-clip text). Feature cards: white + border + shadow. Stats: solid `$accentTeal` (was gradient text). `.heroGlow`: `display: none`.

   - **`apps/web/src/pages/Search/Search.module.scss`** ‚Äî Title: `$accentTeal`. Skeletons: `$bgSurface`‚Üí`$bgElevated` shimmer. White skeleton cards.

   - **`apps/web/src/pages/CandidateProfile/CandidateProfile.module.scss`** ‚Äî Name: `$accentTeal`. noVideo: white bg + border. Section titles: `$accentTeal`. Removed glass from noVideo.

   - **`apps/web/src/pages/Register/Register.module.scss`** ‚Äî Title: `$accentTeal`. Form: white bg + solid border + shadow. Textarea: white bg, inset focus shadow.

   - **`apps/web/src/components/Layout/Layout.tsx`** ‚Äî NOT modified. Uses `AnimatePresence mode="wait"` wrapping `PageTransition` keyed by `location.pathname`. Important for understanding the animation bug.

   - **`apps/web/src/components/PageTransition/PageTransition.tsx`** ‚Äî NOT modified. Uses `motion.div` with `initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }}`, `animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}`, `exit={{ opacity: 0, y: -20 }}`.

   - **`apps/web/src/pages/CandidateProfile/CandidateProfile.tsx`** ‚Äî NOT modified. Read during investigation. Uses 2-column grid with `motion.div` for videoSection and info, each with their own entrance animations.

4. Errors and fixes:
   - **No build/type errors**: `npm run check-types` and `npm run build` both passed on first attempt after all changes.
   - **PageTransition animation stuck at opacity:0**: When navigating via client-side routing (clicking candidate card on /search), the new page's `PageTransition` `motion.div` gets stuck at exit state (`opacity: 0`, `transform: translate(0, -20px)`). Diagnosed using `browser_evaluate` to walk the DOM chain and find the ancestor with `opacity: 0`. Root cause: `AnimatePresence mode="wait"` in Layout.tsx conflicting with nested `motion.div` animations in CandidateProfile.tsx. This is a **pre-existing bug** ‚Äî PageTransition.tsx and Layout.tsx were NOT modified by our CSS changes. Works correctly on direct page load (full navigation).
   - **Console errors**: `favicon.ico` 404 (missing favicon), video file 404 (external Pexels URL), WebSocket connection warning (API server ws endpoint). All pre-existing, not CSS-related.

5. Problem Solving:
   - Implemented the complete 6-phase visual overhaul successfully with zero type/build errors
   - Used "zero-rename approach" ‚Äî SCSS variables kept same names but CSS custom property values changed, giving automatic propagation to ~35 files
   - Manually removed all `backdrop-filter: blur()`, gradient fills, `color: white` hardcodes, gradient text fills, pill radii
   - Verified no remnants via grep searches for `backdrop-filter`, `color: white`, `-webkit-text-fill-color: transparent`, `9999` patterns
   - During visual QA, investigated invisible candidate profile page by tracing DOM opacity chain to find the stuck animation

6. All user messages:
   - "Implement the following plan: # RemiliaNET-Style UI Redesign ‚Äî Full Visual Overhaul [full detailed plan with 6 phases, 41 files, design tokens, color palette, CSS patterns]"
   - "–ù–∞ —Å–∞–π—Ç–µ –µ—Å—Ç—å –±–∞–≥–∏, —è –º–æ–≥—É –¥–∞—Ç—å —Ç–µ–±–µ –∑–∞–¥–∞—á—É –æ—Ç—Ç–µ—Å—Ç–∏—Ä–æ–≤–∞—Ç—å –≤—Å–µ —Å–∞–º–æ—Å—Ç–æ—è—Ç–µ–ª—å–Ω–æ?" (There are bugs on the site, can I give you a task to test everything yourself?)
   - "–ê –∫–∞–∫ —Ç—ã –±—É–¥–µ—à—å –ø—Ä–æ–≤–µ—Ä—è—Ç—å?" (How will you check?)
   - "–û—Ç–ª–∏—á–Ω–æ, —Ç–æ–≥–¥–∞ –ø—Ä–æ–≤–µ—Ä—å –ø–æ–∂–∞–ª—É–π—Å—Ç–∞ –≤–µ—Å—å –≤–µ–± —Å–∞–π—Ç" (Great, then please check the whole website)

7. Pending Tasks:
   - Complete the visual QA of the entire website (was in progress)
   - Specifically: finish analysis of all screenshots taken and compile a bug report
   - The PageTransition animation bug (pre-existing) could optionally be investigated/fixed if user wants

8. Current Work:
   I was in the middle of visually testing the entire website using Playwright MCP. I had completed screenshots and visual inspection of all 5 main pages:
   - `/` (Landing) ‚Äî looks correct
   - `/search` (Search) ‚Äî looks correct
   - `/register` (Register) ‚Äî looks correct
   - `/chat` (Chat) ‚Äî looks correct, including conversation view
   - `/candidate/:id` (CandidateProfile) ‚Äî renders correctly on direct load, but has a pre-existing PageTransition animation bug when navigating from /search via client-side routing

   I had just finished reading `CandidateProfile.tsx` to verify the grid layout structure (2-column grid with motion.div for videoSection and info sections) when the summary was requested. I was about to compile all findings into a final bug report for the user.

9. Optional Next Step:
   Report the visual QA findings to the user. The user said "–û—Ç–ª–∏—á–Ω–æ, —Ç–æ–≥–¥–∞ –ø—Ä–æ–≤–µ—Ä—å –ø–æ–∂–∞–ª—É–π—Å—Ç–∞ –≤–µ—Å—å –≤–µ–± —Å–∞–π—Ç" (check the whole website). All pages have been checked. The findings are:
   - All 5 pages render correctly with the new RemiliaNET light theme
   - No CSS bugs found from our redesign changes
   - One pre-existing animation bug: PageTransition gets stuck at opacity:0 when navigating via client-side routing to candidate profile (AnimatePresence mode="wait" issue in Layout.tsx ‚Äî not related to our CSS changes)
   - Console: favicon 404, video source 404, WebSocket warning ‚Äî all pre-existing
</summary>
